message:
bench(perf): add Criterion benchmark harness for input latency framework (ft-1memj.25)

Adds input_latency_bench.rs with 12 Criterion benchmarks measuring:
- Stage timestamp recording overhead (target: <100ns)
- Total/stage latency computation
- Percentile computation at 100/1000/10000 sample sizes
- Budget evaluation throughput
- Report generation with/without budget
- Collector recording with and without eviction
Registers benchmark in Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -364,6 +364,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "scan_pipeline"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "input_latency_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
